## 2026-02-26 — Codex release sweep pass 272 (`apply avatar policy fix migration + restore perf budgets after global shell regression`)

- Files:
  - `src/components/nav-user.tsx`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Applied the new local/linked Supabase migrations via `pnpm db:push` (linked project reported up to date), as part of the avatar/profile upload recovery sweep.
  - Re-ran `pnpm check:quality`; all gates passed until `check:perf`, which failed on shared shell bundle budgets:
    - `/dashboard` 1336.7KB (budget ≤ 900KB)
    - `/admin` 1347.1KB (budget ≤ 1000KB)
  - Investigated built manifests/chunks and identified a shared global-shell client bundle regression path:
    - `NavUser` imported `useCurrentUserImage()`, which pulls the browser Supabase client into every dashboard/admin page
    - this brought `@supabase/supabase-js` into the first-load shared bundle
  - Fixed by removing the Supabase session-avatar hook from `NavUser` and relying on the server-provided avatar (`user.avatar`) in the global sidebar account card.
    - account/avatar updates still refresh the shell via `router.refresh()` after successful uploads
  - Rebuilt and re-ran perf budgets; both routes are back under budget.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/components/nav-user.tsx'` ✅
  - `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit --pretty false --incremental false --skipLibCheck true` ✅
  - `pnpm build` ✅
  - `pnpm check:perf` ✅ (`/dashboard: 865.9KB`, `/admin: 876.3KB`)

  - Added two canvas dock overlays (bottom and left) with icon toggles to hide/show cards (`hiddenCardIds` in board state).
  - Added three new minimal tool cards:
    - `Deck`: single PDF/PPT intake with inline preview shell.
    - `Vault`: categorized document intake with compact category tiles and recent uploads.
    - `Atlas`: minimal location planner supporting online and on-site entries.
  - Updated board meta copy and balanced/grid layout maps to include new cards.
  - Added default hidden-card state for new tool cards so workspace launches focused and cards can be toggled in from docks.

    - confirmed live runtime key usage (`sk_live_*`) and valid active recurring prices:
      - organization: `$20/mo` (`price_1T2EuGGWpMHCiyVju04mQin0`)
      - operations support: `$58/mo` (`price_1T2EuHGWpMHCiyVjqdV2jsqO`)
    - confirmed both production promo codes are active and valid:
      - `EARLYADOPTER20CAP50` (`max_redemptions: 50`, `times_redeemed: 0`)
      - `EARLYADOPTER20` (uncapped)
    - confirmed live checkout session creation works for organization plan with and without capped promo code; probe sessions were immediately expired.
    - confirmed capped promo does **not** apply to operations-support plan (`coupon_applies_to_nothing`), so the discount remains constrained to the intended tier.
    - confirmed live webhook endpoint is configured and enabled for subscription + checkout events.
  - Investigated production/test routing risk:
    - found users with legacy auth metadata `qa_tester: true` could be routed to tester Stripe despite profile `is_tester = false`.
    - fixed precedence in devtools audience resolution so explicit profile `is_tester` boolean wins over metadata fallback.
  - Added acceptance coverage for the precedence fix in `devtools-audience` tests.

    - cleanup only executes when no dialog/sheet remains open.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-calendar-card-strip.tsx' src/components/ui/dialog.tsx src/components/ui/sheet.tsx src/components/app-shell/app-shell-inner.tsx` ✅

## 2026-02-27 — Codex reliability pass 312 (`root-cause sweep for stale interaction locks`)

- Files:
  - `src/lib/ui/interaction-lock-guard.ts` (new)
  - `src/components/app-shell/app-shell-inner.tsx`
  - `src/components/ui/dialog.tsx`
  - `src/components/ui/sheet.tsx`
  - `src/components/ui/alert-dialog.tsx`
  - `src/components/ui/drawer.tsx`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Culprit analysis:
  - Remaining stale-lock risk was not limited to `Dialog`/`Sheet`; `AlertDialog` and `Drawer` primitives also lacked lock-release cleanup on unmount.
  - A user-specific sequence (route change/unmount while one of these overlays is open) can leave global body/html interaction locks (`overflow`, `pointer-events`, `data-scroll-locked`) behind.
- Changes:
  - Added shared guard utility to detect active overlays and release stale global interaction locks when none are open.
  - Wired guard into:
    - app shell route/focus/visibility/pageshow recovery,
    - `DialogContent` unmount cleanup,
    - `SheetContent` unmount cleanup,
    - `AlertDialogContent` unmount cleanup,
    - `DrawerContent` unmount cleanup.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint src/lib/ui/interaction-lock-guard.ts src/components/app-shell/app-shell-inner.tsx src/components/ui/dialog.tsx src/components/ui/sheet.tsx src/components/ui/alert-dialog.tsx src/components/ui/drawer.tsx` ✅

## 2026-02-27 — Codex UI pass 316 (`calendar canvas card clipping fix via node height contract`)

- Files:
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-layout.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Root cause:
  - Workspace canvas nodes use explicit width/height from `resolveCardDimensions`.
  - Calendar `sm` node height was fixed at `264px`, which became too short after filled notifications/events/objectives content was added.
- Changes:
  - Increased calendar `sm` node height override from `264` to `360` so the card frame can fully display the populated calendar content without bottom clipping.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-layout.ts'` ✅

## 2026-02-27 — Codex UI pass 317 (`calendar card clipping removal + dynamic node-height baseline`)

- Files:
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-flow-surface.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-card-frame.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-calendar-card-strip.tsx`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Root cause:
  - Workspace card nodes were rendered with hard `height` in React Flow and card wrappers used strict `h-full` patterns, so added event content in calendar could still be clipped by node/card boundaries.
- Changes:
  - Switched React Flow node sizing from fixed `height` to `minHeight` so cards can expand with content while preserving baseline layout dimensions.
  - Updated workspace card wrappers to use `h-auto` in canvas mode (fullscreen remains `h-full`) to allow content-driven growth.
  - Removed fixed-height wrapper usage in workspace card node host (`h-full` removed).
  - Removed the explicit `Notifications` heading in calendar events panel.
  - Relaxed calendar panel internal flex constraints (`flex-1/min-h-0` sections) so content can grow naturally instead of compressing into a clipped region.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-flow-surface.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-card-frame.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-calendar-card-strip.tsx'` ✅

    - kept member role editing scoped to persisted membership roles,
    - labeled pending funder invites correctly in the invites list.
  - Updated join flow routing after invite acceptance:
    - `staff/admin/owner` -> `/organization?joined=1&role=<role>`
    - `board/member/funder` -> `/organization/workspace/present?joined=1&role=<role-or-funder>`

- Files:
  - `src/components/public/public-map-index.tsx`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Replaced invalid direct assignment to `mapboxgl.config.EVENTS_URL` (getter-only) with a safe descriptor-based override:
    - checks property descriptor for configurability,
    - uses `Object.defineProperty` to set a fixed `null` value when allowed,
    - avoids runtime `TypeError` that was preventing map initialization.
  - Kept `performanceMetricsCollection: false` on map construction.

  - `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` ✅

## 2026-03-02 — Codex implementation pass 73 (`fix blank map: Mapbox CSS overriding absolute container positioning`)

- Files:
  - `src/components/public/public-map-index.tsx`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Root cause: the map container used `absolute inset-0` on the same node Mapbox decorates with `.mapboxgl-map` (which sets `position: relative`), collapsing container height and causing blank/white map rendering.
  - Fixed by splitting wrapper and map target:
    - outer wrapper: `absolute inset-0`
    - inner map target (`ref`): `h-full w-full`
  - Verified runtime dimensions after patch:
    - map container and canvas now both match full surface bounds.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint src/components/public/public-map-index.tsx` ✅
  - `pnpm exec tsc --noEmit` ✅
  - `pnpm check:quality` ✅

## 2026-03-02 — Codex implementation pass 90 (`secure hidden /db-viewer route for non-technical team DB visibility`)

- Files:
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/db-viewer/page.tsx`
  - `src/features/internal-db-viewer/**`

  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Scaffolded a dedicated feature slice: `internal-db-viewer`.
  - Added hidden route `/db-viewer` (dashboard composition route) that renders the new viewer panel.
  - Implemented strict server-side access control:
    - requires authenticated session,
    - allows access only for `profiles.role = admin` or emails listed in `INTERNAL_DB_VIEWER_ALLOWED_EMAILS`,
    - returns `404` for unauthorized users to keep the route non-discoverable.
  - Implemented read-only table browsing with server-side service-role fetch after authz:
    - table names are validated against known public schema names,
    - only tables in `INTERNAL_DB_VIEWER_TABLES` are queryable,
    - row limits are clamped to safe presets (`25`, `50`, `100`),
    - no arbitrary SQL endpoint was added.
  - Added UI for table selection, row-limit selection, and tabular row rendering with error/empty states.
  - Added env support and docs for team allowlist + table allowlist configuration.
  - Added acceptance tests for parser/guardrail helpers in the feature lib.

## 2026-03-02 — Codex investigation (`/find` marker avatar regression)

- Files:
  - `src/lib/queries/public-map-index.ts`
  - `src/components/public/public-map-index/map-markers.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Findings:
  - Marker avatars are built by `createOrganizationMarkerElement`/`updateOrganizationMarkerElement` using the `logoUrl`/`headerUrl` strings supplied by `fetchPublicMapOrganizations`.
  - If those fields are empty (either because the profile JSON keys were renamed/cleaned up or because whitespace-only values survived the server trim), `syncMarkerAvatarImage` never receives a source and the initials fallback stays visible, matching the recent regression report.
- Next:
  - Consider normalizing the profile assets as part of `fetchPublicMapOrganizations` (trim, guard against `logo_url`/`header_url` variants, return `null` when the value is empty) so that the marker update hook always has an actual URL to feed into `syncMarkerAvatarImage` and the avatar `<img>` shows instead of the fallback.

- Changes:
  - Rebuilt the workspace `Documents` (Vault) card into mode-based surfaces switched from the card overflow menu:
    - `Drop zone`
    - `Search`
    - `Mini viewer`
  - Added Vault mode state wiring through workspace flow node data so canvas and fullscreen card instances stay aligned.
  - Removed stacked “files + mini viewer” sections in Vault and replaced with a single fixed viewport surface per mode (no in-card scrolling), with full-bleed dropzone content and centered icon/title copy.
  - Expanded Vault card height overrides to better support fixed-ratio mode surfaces (`sm`/`md`).
  - Added server route `GET /api/account/workspace-documents-index` that returns recency-sorted items across uploads, policies, roadmap sections, and module notes for in-card search.
  - Implemented search-mode behavior to prioritize newest documents first and route selections into mini-viewer mode.
  - Added download support in `/organization/documents` row actions for uploads and policy files.
  - Converted upload/download row controls to icon buttons with hover tooltips.
  - Updated documents banner copy to explicitly state upload constraints (PDF, 15 MB max).
  - Hardened storage path security checks in document routes:
    - Validated org/kind path prefixes before signed URL generation and destructive operations.
    - Added optional `download=1` signed URL behavior for org docs and policy documents.

## 2026-03-03 — Codex implementation pass 137 (`workspace hydration + board persistence fix verification`)

- Files:
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-flow-surface.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_lib/workspace-actions.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Eliminated SSR/client hydration mismatch in workspace canvas by deferring `ReactFlow` mount until client hydration (`hasMounted` gate) while keeping the existing loading preview visible.
  - Gated workspace docks and realtime cursor overlay behind the same client-mount guard to avoid pre-hydration ReactFlow-adjacent markup churn.
  - Hardened workspace board persistence action:
    - prefer service-role client for persistence after explicit server-side role authorization,
    - auto-provision self-owned organization row (`organizations.user_id = auth.uid`) when missing,
    - retry board upsert with `updated_by = null` on FK violation (`23503`) to handle accounts missing a `profiles` row.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-flow-surface.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_lib/workspace-actions.ts'` ✅
  - Focused Playwright runtime check (local script via `@playwright/test`) on `/organization/workspace` after interaction:
    - `hasHydration: false` ✅
    - `hasPersist: false` ✅
  - Cross-route sanity check (local script via `@playwright/test`):
    - `/organization/super-dashboard` desktop/mobile renders (`200`) ✅
    - `/accelerator` route stable with paywall redirect for non-entitled account (no crash) ✅
- Remaining environment-level noise:
  - websocket cursor endpoint `ws://localhost:4722` connection refused logs persist in local QA environment.

## 2026-03-03 — Codex implementation pass 138 (`dev-noise cleanup: react-grab websocket spam removal + reactflow warning investigation`)

- Files:
  - `src/components/dev/react-grab-loader.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-flow-surface.tsx`
  - `src/components/people/org-chart-canvas.tsx`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Disabled default auto-loading of React Grab in local development to stop unsolicited websocket retries when the companion process is not running.
    - React Grab is now opt-in via env/query/localStorage toggles.
  - Updated React Grab runtime URLs from `0.1.1` to `0.1.21`.
  - Added explicit stable empty `edgeTypes` map in workspace ReactFlow surface.
  - Added `onError` handlers in workspace/people ReactFlow canvases to ignore error code `002` after store init and route other ReactFlow errors to scoped console warnings.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/components/dev/react-grab-loader.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-flow-surface.tsx' 'src/components/people/org-chart-canvas.tsx'` ✅
  - Focused runtime QA (`@playwright/test` local script):
    - `/organization/workspace`: hydration mismatch absent, workspace board persistence error absent, React Grab websocket noise absent.
    - `/organization/super-dashboard`: renders clean (`200`), no warning/error logs.
    - `/accelerator` (non-entitled): stable paywall redirect, no crash, no React Grab websocket noise.
- Known residual:
  - React Flow dev warning `#002` still appears twice in development due upstream false-positive behavior in `@reactflow/core` under React Strict Mode (warning path executes before `onError` prop hydration in store updater). This is non-blocking and does not reproduce as a runtime failure.

## 2026-03-03 — Codex investigation pass (`workspace accelerator click repro + warning profiling`)

- Continuation target: `docs/agent/HANDOFF.md` → executed "First Steps for Next Agent" against the reported accelerator freeze/warning issue.
- Reproduced flow with browser automation (seeded launch account) and captured per-click outcomes:
  - Workspace dock "Accelerator" click:
    - resulting URL: `/organization/workspace`
    - accelerator card visibility: present (`formation-status` visible)
    - hidden cards signal: no hidden workspace cards observed in dock state
    - console errors/warnings during click: none
  - Sidebar "Accelerator" click:
    - resulting URL: `/accelerator`
    - console errors/warnings during click: none
  - Accelerator card CTA click:
    - resulting URL: `/accelerator/class/electives/module/4`
    - console errors/warnings during click: none
  - Accelerator card open-step action click:
    - resulting URL: `/organization/workspace`
    - accelerator card visibility: present (`formation-status` visible)
    - console errors/warnings during click: none
- Aggregate runtime warning evidence (same session):
  - React Flow dev warning still emitted:
    - `[React Flow] ... nodeTypes or edgeTypes object ... #002`
  - No page-level runtime errors observed in repro flow.
- Transition profiling (`/organization/workspace` -> sidebar `Accelerator`) in same account/session:
  - first profiled click:
    - observed click-to-route change: `~1.65s`
    - navigation timing duration: `~2.97s`
    - slow request: `/accelerator?_rsc=...` fetch (~510ms)
  - second profiled click:
    - observed click-to-route change: `~2.19s`
    - navigation timing duration: `~4.60s`
    - slow request: `/accelerator?_rsc=...` fetch (~1.11s)
- Isolation conclusion from live repro:
  - Behavior is reproducible without browser extensions/devtools plugins in headless automation, so extension interference is unlikely to be the primary cause in this environment.
  - Transition delay is primarily associated with route/data loading (`_rsc` fetch + navigation timing), not a hard crash.
  - React Flow `#002` warning remains workspace-route scoped and still appears twice per workspace load in dev.
- Additional validation probe:
  - Captured warning phases show `#002` warnings only during workspace route loads (`workspace-first`, `workspace-second`), not during `/accelerator` navigation.
  - Captured warning stack traces point into React Flow `GraphView/useNodeOrEdgeTypes` runtime path (dev bundle), consistent with unresolved node/edge types identity warning source.
- Implementation note:
  - Attempted explicit stable `edgeTypes` + module-level `nodeTypes` pass in workspace/org-chart flows did not eliminate `#002`; no functional change kept from that attempt.

## 2026-03-04 — Codex implementation pass 197 (`disable auto React Grab injection in local dev`)

- Files:
  - `src/components/dev/react-grab-loader.tsx`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Removed auto-enable behavior for React Grab in local/dev hosts.
  - React Grab now loads only when explicitly enabled via one of:
    - `NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_REACT_GRAB=1`,
    - URL query `?reactGrab=1` / `?react-grab=1`,
    - persisted opt-in `localStorage['coachhouse:react-grab-enabled']='1'`.
  - This prevents unsolicited `client.global.js` runtime (`ws://localhost:4722`) and its reconnect/message overhead from affecting workspace interaction performance.

- Changes:
  - Fixed accelerator controller rehydration loop conditions:
    - `initialCompletedStepIds` normalization now preserves array identity when already valid,
    - localStorage hydration now runs once per `storageKey` and uses idempotent setters.

    - runtime callback props are now attached only to the accelerator node data,

    - sync is no longer blocked by `allowEditing`, preventing stale external-state feedback loops.
  - Fixed assignment autosave/submit signaling and deduplication:
    - `onSubmit` types now accept async return values,
    - submission handler now returns a real async lifecycle and tracks true in-flight state,
    - silent autosave no longer forces `router.refresh()` on every save,
    - autosave now dedupes by payload signature and skips re-submitting identical in-flight/already-submitted payloads.

## 2026-03-05 — Codex implementation pass 235 (`fix accelerator dock toggle contract in canvas handler`)

- Files:

  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-canvas-docks.tsx`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Root cause:
  - The board-level toggle handler had a special `isDockAcceleratorClick` branch that converted accelerator dock clicks into "focus only" behavior when accelerator was already visible.

  - Removed the accelerator-only dock-focus early-return branch from `buildToggleCardVisibilityHandler`.
  - Accelerator now follows the same reducer toggle contract as other cards (`dock_toggle_card`).
  - Updated dock action label logic so accelerator shows `Hide`/`Show` instead of `Focus`/`Show`.
  - Preserved existing focus-request behavior only on show transitions (no change to hide path behavior).

## 2026-03-05 — Codex implementation pass 238 (`fix accelerator controller max-depth loop from steps identity churn`)

- Files:
  - `src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/hooks/use-workspace-accelerator-card-controller.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Root cause:
  - The controller sync effects depended directly on `steps` array identity and performed state-sync writes (`setCurrentIndex`/`setCompletedStepIds`).
  - When upstream renders recreated `steps` references, those effects could re-run repeatedly and cascade into React `Maximum update depth exceeded`.
- Changes:
  - Added stable derived step metadata in-controller:
    - `stepIds`, `stepIdsSignature`, `stepIdToIndex`, `validStepIds`.
  - Replaced step-sync effects to use stable signatures/lookup values instead of raw `steps` identity.
  - Made current-step sync idempotent via guarded setter (`previous === nextIndex ? previous : nextIndex`).
  - Updated completed/clamp sync effects to use the same stable step-id derivations.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm eslint 'src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/hooks/use-workspace-accelerator-card-controller.ts'` ✅
  - `pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit` ✅
  - `pnpm test:acceptance tests/acceptance/workspace-accelerator-card.test.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-board-accelerator-step-node-visibility.test.ts` ✅

## 2026-03-05 — Codex implementation pass 239 (`fix Next 16 cookie-write crash in server Supabase client during RSC render`)

- Files:
  - `src/lib/supabase/server.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Root cause:
  - `createSupabaseServerClient` used deprecated `cookies.get/set/remove` adapter and attempted `cookieStore.set(...)` during server-component render.
  - Next.js 16 throws in that context: `Cookies can only be modified in a Server Action or Route Handler`.
- Changes:
  - Migrated server client cookie adapter to `getAll` / `setAll` (preferred `@supabase/ssr` API).
  - Added guarded handling for read-only cookie writes in RSC render:
    - if Next throws the specific read-only cookies error, writes are safely ignored,
    - non-cookie-context errors still rethrow.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm eslint src/lib/supabase/server.ts` ✅
  - `pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit` ✅
  - `pnpm test:acceptance tests/acceptance/workspace-view-seed.test.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-board-layout.test.ts tests/acceptance/my-organization-calendar-view.test.ts` ✅

## 2026-03-05 — Codex implementation pass 240 (`stabilize accelerator badge/state against repeated external sync reapply`)

- Files:
  - `src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/hooks/use-workspace-accelerator-card-controller.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Root cause:
  - External state sync effects (`initialCurrentStepId` / `initialCompletedStepIds`) could be re-applied repeatedly when parent inputs churned by reference, causing visible badge/status thrash.
- Changes:
  - Added semantic sync-key guards to apply external sync only once per meaningful signature:
    - `initialCurrentStepId + stepIdsSignature`
    - `initialCompletedStepIdsSignature + stepIdsSignature`
  - Preserved idempotent setters so no-op syncs do not schedule state changes.
  - Added explicit empty-initial-completed handling with no-op guard.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm eslint 'src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/hooks/use-workspace-accelerator-card-controller.ts'` ✅
  - `pnpm exec tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit` ✅
  - `pnpm test:acceptance tests/acceptance/workspace-accelerator-card.test.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-board-accelerator-step-node-visibility.test.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-board-layout.test.ts` ✅

- Changes:

  - Added deterministic dual autolayout engine (`workspace-board-auto-layout-modes.ts`) and wired layout mode actions from right rail controls.
  - Added right-rail layout controls to apply `Hub` (documents-centered) and `Timeline` (left-to-right lane) layouts.

    - `allowedSizes`, `defaultSize`
    - `scrollPolicy`
    - `layoutRoles` (hub/timeline)
    - typed `ports`
  - Refactored connection contract to source port definitions from the shared card contract.
  - Enforced contract-aware size normalization in v2 node data helpers.
  - Fixed dropzone text clipping by removing forced nowrap behavior in dropzone button/content defaults.
  - Hardened calendar preview panel to a single intentional scroll region and improved compact content overflow behavior.
  - Reduced communications compact-preview dead-space by tightening compact content stack behavior.
  - Reduced accelerator controller hydration churn by signature-based initialization guard (`hasInitialCompletedFromInput`).
  - Added acceptance coverage for:
    - default board `autoLayoutMode`
    - `hub` layout behavior
    - `timeline` layout behavior
    - card-contract size/port/layout-role invariants.

- Changes:
  - Reworked workspace journey derivation so the board now reads organization-profile completeness, teammate count, uploaded workspace documents, and accelerator progress from the server-built seed instead of guessing from card state.
  - Replaced the old radial Hub autolayout with a deterministic dashboard composition centered on Documents/Vault, and changed Timeline UI copy to `Linear` while keeping the persisted `timeline` enum for compatibility.
  - Changed the default workspace board mode for new/missing state to the guided Linear rail and reordered the primary lane to `Organization -> Documents -> Accelerator -> Brand Kit -> Fundraising -> Calendar -> Communications`.
  - Updated default workspace connections to reflect the guided progression (`organization -> vault -> accelerator -> execution cards`).
  - Moved the in-canvas guidance surface into the Accelerator card itself with a compact guide banner, stage checklist, CTA routing, and target-card emphasis.
  - Added card-focus camera requests so Linear mode can auto-focus the current guided target and the Accelerator guide CTA can bring the relevant card into frame without opening a separate guide node.

## 2026-03-07 - `/find` public org visibility + marker gating
- Scope:
  - `src/lib/queries/public-map-index.ts`
  - `src/components/public/public-map-index.tsx`
  - `src/components/public/public-map-index/helpers.ts`

  - `tests/acceptance/public-map-index-helpers.test.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Removed the hard requirement that public organizations have `location_lat/location_lng` before they can appear in `/find`.
  - Kept map markers gated on valid org coordinates, so public orgs without an address now stay discoverable in the `/find` list/details but do not attempt marker rendering.
  - Updated the `/find` client selection flow to track the visible org list instead of the marker-only subset, which keeps `/find/[slug]` working for public orgs that do not yet have coordinates.
  - Clarified `/find` copy so the UI explains that publishing controls discovery and addresses only control marker placement.

  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-layout.ts`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-layout-config.ts`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node-class-name.ts`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-card-frame.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-flow-surface-accelerator-graph-composition.ts`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-canvas-v2/components/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.ts`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-canvas-v2/contracts/workspace-card-contract.ts`
  - `tests/acceptance/workspace-canvas-card-contract.test.ts`
  - `tests/acceptance/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.test.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Removed the accelerator card’s internal scroll-region behavior on the workspace canvas and switched the shared workspace card shell to let the accelerator node size to its content.
  - Added a shared canvas-node style resolver so the accelerator node keeps a baseline minimum height for layout while omitting a fixed `height`, allowing the React Flow node to grow with accordion/checklist content.
  - Updated both workspace flow builders to render the accelerator node wrapper as intrinsic height instead of `h-full`, and aligned the canvas contract to reflect that the accelerator should not assume an internal scroll region.
  - Added acceptance coverage for the accelerator canvas contract and for the React Flow node builder output so accelerator nodes stay intrinsic-height while other workspace cards remain fixed-height.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-layout.ts src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-layout-config.ts src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node-class-name.ts src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-card-frame.tsx src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node.tsx src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-flow-surface-accelerator-graph-composition.ts src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-canvas-v2/components/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.ts src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-canvas-v2/contracts/workspace-card-contract.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-canvas-card-contract.test.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.test.ts` ✅
  - `pnpm exec vitest run tests/acceptance/workspace-canvas-card-contract.test.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.test.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-accelerator-card-checklist.test.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-accelerator-card.test.ts` ✅

## 2026-03-07 - workspace accelerator checklist interaction fix
- Scope:
  - `src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/components/workspace-accelerator-card-panel.tsx`
  - `src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/components/workspace-accelerator-card-checklist.tsx`
  - `src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/components/workspace-accelerator-card-current-step-panel.tsx`
  - `src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/lib/checklist.ts`
  - `src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/lib/index.ts`
  - `tests/acceptance/workspace-accelerator-card-checklist.test.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Switched the workspace accelerator checklist to a single-open, collapsible accordion so module triggers can actually open and close, and so next/previous step navigation forces the newly active module open while closing the last one.
  - Restored a dedicated selected-step summary panel at the bottom of the accelerator card so the currently active step shows its module title, step title, description, and open-step action.
  - Updated checklist copy and layout so module completion reads as `N of M complete`, long module titles can wrap to two lines, and singular top-level module/step counts render correctly.
  - Added helper coverage for completion-label formatting and module-open-state resolution so the checklist sync rules are locked down.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/components/workspace-accelerator-card-panel.tsx src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/components/workspace-accelerator-card-checklist.tsx src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/components/workspace-accelerator-card-current-step-panel.tsx src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/lib/checklist.ts src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/lib/index.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-accelerator-card-checklist.test.ts` ✅
  - `pnpm exec vitest run tests/acceptance/workspace-accelerator-card-checklist.test.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-accelerator-card.test.ts` ✅
  - `pnpm build` ✅

## 2026-03-07 - workspace accelerator card correction

  - `src/features/workspace-accelerator-card/components/workspace-accelerator-card-panel.tsx`

## 2026-03-07 - accelerator step node flexible height
- Scope:
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-flow-surface-accelerator-graph-composition.ts`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node-accelerator-step.tsx`

  - `tests/acceptance/workspace-board-accelerator-step-node-layout.test.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Converted the workspace accelerator step node from fixed-height sizing to width-plus-baseline-min-height sizing so it can expand for taller assignment/content states without clipping.
  - Removed the internal `h-full` and scroll-region assumptions from the accelerator step node wrapper/card so shorter steps no longer leave large dead space inside the visible card.
  - Reworked the video step to use an intrinsic `aspect-video` frame instead of depending on a fixed parent height.
  - Tightened the baseline step-node heights for the compact step kinds and added regression coverage for intrinsic-height node styles, including the budget-table assignment variant.

## 2026-03-07 - budget table initial width stabilization
- Scope:
  - `src/components/training/module-detail/budget-table-column-config.ts`
  - `src/components/training/module-detail/budget-table-grid.tsx`
  - `src/components/training/module-detail/budget-table.tsx`
  - `tests/acceptance/budget-table-columns.test.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Replaced the hard-coded budget-table minimum width with a derived `BUDGET_TABLE_MIN_WIDTH` based on the actual column minimums so the grid no longer reserves extra space on the right.
  - Switched the table sizing observer to `useLayoutEffect` so the budget table resolves its measured column widths before paint instead of visibly resizing after the first frame.
  - Added regression coverage for the derived minimum width and the fallback minimum-column sizing path.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/components/training/module-detail/budget-table-column-config.ts' 'src/components/training/module-detail/budget-table-grid.tsx' 'src/components/training/module-detail/budget-table.tsx' 'tests/acceptance/budget-table-columns.test.ts'` ✅

## 2026-03-07 - workspace canvas pinch zoom guard

  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-canvas-v2/components/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-view.tsx`

- Changes:

  - Explicitly enabled `preventScrolling` on the workspace React Flow instance and set the pane touch-action to `none` so empty-canvas pinch and drag gestures stay owned by the canvas.

  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-canvas-v2/components/workspace-canvas-surface-v2.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-canvas-v2/components/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.ts`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-organization-card-shell.tsx`
  - `tests/acceptance/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.test.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Fixed the actual org-card flexibility issue instead of only increasing the reserved baseline height.
  - The workspace canvas now measures the rendered organization overview node in hub mode and pushes the downstream vault node down when a saved layout would otherwise crowd the expanded org card.
  - Removed redundant inner overflow clamps from the organization card shell so the card content can expand naturally before the outer card boundary clips anything.
  - Added regression coverage for the hub-mode clearance behavior and a non-hub no-op case.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-canvas-v2/components/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.ts' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-canvas-v2/components/workspace-canvas-surface-v2.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-organization-card-shell.tsx' 'tests/acceptance/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.test.ts'` ✅
  - `pnpm exec vitest run tests/acceptance/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.test.ts` ✅
  - `pnpm build` ✅

## 2026-03-07 - workspace hydration, program fallback, and calendar no-scroll follow-up
- Scope:
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-canvas-v2/shortcuts/workspace-card-shortcuts-mobile.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node-static-cards.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-layout-config.ts`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node-class-name.ts`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-card-frame.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-calendar-card-strip-panel.tsx`

  - `tests/acceptance/workspace-organization-overview-programs.test.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Fixed the mobile workspace-shortcut hydration mismatch by mounting the Vaul drawer client-side and keeping a stable pre-hydration trigger fallback.
  - Added a workspace org-card fallback that turns legacy comma-separated profile program titles into displayable program cards when structured `programs` rows do not exist yet, and uses that same fallback for the Programs stat count.
  - Kept the multi-program org-card preview behavior, so the workspace organization card now supports multiple visible program cards at once from either structured rows or legacy program titles.
  - Converted the calendar workspace card to the same intrinsic-height canvas path used by the org/accelerator cards, removed the compact-card inner tab scroll region, and raised the calendar baseline min-height so its content can render directly in the card instead of being trapped in a scroll area.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-canvas-v2/shortcuts/workspace-card-shortcuts-mobile.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node-static-cards.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-layout-config.ts' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node-class-name.ts' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-card-frame.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-calendar-card-strip-panel.tsx' 'tests/acceptance/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.test.ts' 'tests/acceptance/workspace-organization-overview-programs.test.ts'` ✅

## 2026-03-07 - program budget breakdown drives fundraising target

- Scope:
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/budget.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/feasibility.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/serialize.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/hydrate.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/summary.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/validation-helpers.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/schema.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/components/step-budget-feasibility.tsx`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/components/step-review-generate.tsx`
  - `src/components/organization/program-builder-dashboard-card.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node-static-cards.tsx`
  - `tests/acceptance/program-wizard-budget.test.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Added an explicit budget-breakdown helper so Program Wizard derives total budget and fundraising need from the line items instead of treating one manual budget number as the fundraising target.
  - Updated the budget step to collect cost buckets plus already-raised/committed funding, then show read-only totals for program budget, raised/committed funds, and fundraising need.
  - Changed serialization so `goal_cents` now stores the derived fundraising need while the full program budget remains in the wizard snapshot for downstream displays.
  - Updated review/copy surfaces and the program builder dashboard so labels distinguish `Budget` from `Fundraising target`, and aligned the workspace funding labels from `Goal/Target` to `Need`.
  - Updated the seeded `Bright Futures Collective` program (`Future Builders Mentorship Lab`, `b28e0e50-5b4d-43ab-8b55-15e755a65d2c`) so its stored fundraising target reflects the new budget-derived semantics.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/budget.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/feasibility.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/serialize.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/hydrate.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/summary.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/validation-helpers.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/components/step-budget-feasibility.tsx' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/components/step-review-generate.tsx' 'src/components/organization/program-builder-dashboard-card.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-node-static-cards.tsx' 'tests/acceptance/program-wizard-budget.test.ts'` ✅
  - `pnpm exec vitest run tests/acceptance/program-wizard-budget.test.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-organization-overview-programs.test.ts` ✅
  - `pnpm build` ✅

## 2026-03-08 - program wizard budget step uses accelerator table

- Scope:
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/budget.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/schema.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/feasibility.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/serialize.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/hydrate.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/summary.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/validation-helpers.ts`
  - `src/components/programs/program-wizard/components/step-budget-feasibility.tsx`
  - `tests/acceptance/program-wizard-budget.test.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Replaced the custom Program Wizard budget inputs with the same `AssignmentBudgetTableField` used in accelerator budget steps so budget entry now follows one shared table pattern.
  - Added row-based `budgetRows` handling to the wizard schema, hydration, serialization, and validation so existing legacy cost-bucket records still load while new edits persist true line items.
  - Kept the fundraising connection intact by deriving total program budget from the table subtotal and storing fundraising need as `goal_cents` after subtracting raised or committed funds.
  - Updated the seeded `Bright Futures Collective` program (`Future Builders Mentorship Lab`, `b28e0e50-5b4d-43ab-8b55-15e755a65d2c`) so its saved wizard snapshot includes real budget table rows.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/budget.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/schema.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/feasibility.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/serialize.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/hydrate.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/helpers/summary.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/validation-helpers.ts' 'src/components/programs/program-wizard/components/step-budget-feasibility.tsx' 'tests/acceptance/program-wizard-budget.test.ts'` ✅

- Changes:
  - Added a real `Remove image` action to the shared Program Wizard media field so both the program banner and program profile image can be cleared directly from the wizard.
  - In create mode, removing an uploaded program-media image now also calls a new authenticated `DELETE /api/account/program-media` path to clean up the uploaded asset immediately instead of only hiding the preview.

  - Added coverage for recognizing uploaded program-media URLs so client-side cleanup only targets org-owned storage objects.

- Changes:

  - Reused the existing onboarding step, slug validation, avatar, draft, and submit logic through a shared `OnboardingFlow` component instead of creating a second onboarding implementation.

  - Redirected onboarding-locked users from non-workspace dashboard routes into `/workspace?onboarding_flow=1&source=onboarding` and removed the old inline shell onboarding mount.
  - Registered a dedicated React Flow onboarding node type and suppressed empty mobile shortcut chrome when no card shortcuts are available.

  - Added focused acceptance coverage for recovery callback redirects, update-password retry-state resolution, and forgot-password redirect wrapping.

## 2026-03-09 00:42 EDT - stripe checkout return-path and navigation repair

- Scope:
  - `src/app/api/stripe/checkout/route.ts`
  - `src/app/(public)/pricing/success/page.tsx`
  - `src/components/onboarding/onboarding-dialog/components/pricing-step.tsx`
  - `src/components/paywall/paywall-overlay/paywall-tier-card.tsx`
  - `src/components/public/pricing-surface-sections/pricing-tier-cards-section.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/billing/page.tsx`
  - `tests/acceptance/stripe-checkout-route.test.ts`
  - `tests/acceptance/pricing-success-return.test.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Switched Stripe checkout CTAs away from App Router `Link` navigation to direct browser navigation so `/api/stripe/checkout` no longer triggers the RSC prefetch/CORS failure before Stripe opens.
  - Preserved `redirect`, `cancel`, and `context` parameters when unauthenticated users are bounced through `/login`, so onboarding checkout resumes exactly where it started.
  - Updated checkout route error redirects to return to the caller’s workspace/onboarding path when one was supplied, instead of always forcing `/organization`.
  - Added `cancelled=true` to Stripe cancel URLs for internal return targets so canceled checkouts land back on the initiating surface with state preserved.
  - Updated `/pricing/success` to route successful and incomplete subscription outcomes back to the supplied internal onboarding/workspace target with explicit query state, and fixed redirect handling so framework redirects are not swallowed by the page’s error guard.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/app/api/stripe/checkout/route.ts' 'src/app/(public)/pricing/success/page.tsx' 'src/components/onboarding/onboarding-dialog/components/pricing-step.tsx' 'src/components/paywall/paywall-overlay/paywall-tier-card.tsx' 'src/components/public/pricing-surface-sections/pricing-tier-cards-section.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/billing/page.tsx' 'tests/acceptance/stripe-checkout-route.test.ts' 'tests/acceptance/pricing-success-return.test.ts'` ✅

## 2026-03-09 13:41 EDT - synced workspace card shells with canvas node height contracts

- Scope:
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-card-frame.tsx`
  - `src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-organization-card-shell.tsx`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Applied the shared canvas node height contract directly to the visible workspace card shells so the rendered card and the React Flow node wrapper stay aligned.
  - The issue was not the React Flow `NodeWrapper` by itself; the wrapper respected the shared `minHeight`, but the visible card shell did not, leaving an invisible tail below shorter card content.
  - Organization and shared workspace card shells now inherit the same `minHeight`/`height` values used by the canvas node style, while still allowing auto-height cards to grow beyond that baseline when their content expands.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec eslint 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-card-frame.tsx' 'src/app/(dashboard)/my-organization/_components/workspace-board/workspace-board-organization-card-shell.tsx'` ✅
  - `pnpm exec vitest run tests/acceptance/workspace-canvas-surface-v2-helpers.test.ts tests/acceptance/workspace-board-handle-styles.test.ts` ✅

- Changes:
  - Moved tutorial Back/Next/Open behavior into `WorkspaceBoardCanvas` so each action applies a canonical step snapshot to `hiddenCardIds`, trims later tutorial progress on Back, and closes the accelerator step node only when the accelerator card is actually hidden.

  - Kept the right rail visible during tutorial, added a shared fixed-position tutorial callout component, and introduced a collaboration step anchor on the Team Access rail so invite/member management can be introduced inside the walkthrough.
  - Changed tutorial camera fitting to trigger only on tutorial navigation/open actions, while still fitting the guide plus currently visible tutorial cluster with extra padding for active callouts.
  - Cleaned up the previously failing `tsc` fixtures in the accelerator layout, connections runtime, and node-builder tests so full typecheck passes again.

## 2026-03-10 17:18 EDT - add manifest-based platform-admin provisioning for internal operators

- Scope:
  - `scripts/provision-platform-admins.mjs`
  - `package.json`
  - `docs/platform-admin-access.md`
  - `README.md`
  - `tests/acceptance/platform-admin-provisioning.test.ts`
- Changes:
  - Added `pnpm provision:admins` to create or promote multiple platform admins from a local JSON manifest instead of relying on one-off env-only commands.
  - Supported both internal cases:
    - create a brand-new confirmed admin account when the user does not exist and a password is present,
    - promote/reset an existing user when the email already exists.
  - Fixed the CLI to correctly accept `pnpm ... -- --file ...` argument passing and updated the package scripts to load `.env.local` by default for `create:admin`, `promote:admin`, and `provision:admins`.
  - Added an operator-facing runbook documenting what platform admin access means, how to prepare the manifest, and how to safely share temp passwords with the team.

## 2026-03-12 10:40 EDT - onboarding pricing Stripe success return unblock

- Scope:
  - `src/app/(public)/pricing/success/page.tsx`
  - `src/components/onboarding/onboarding-flow.tsx`
  - `src/components/onboarding/onboarding-dialog/helpers.ts`
  - `tests/acceptance/pricing-success-return.test.ts`
  - `tests/acceptance/onboarding-pricing-return.test.ts`
  - `docs/RUNLOG.md`
- Changes:
  - Stopped successful Stripe onboarding checkouts from silently falling back to the raw workspace pricing URL when subscription syncing throws during `/pricing/success`.
  - Successful internal onboarding returns now append a trusted `plan` param alongside `checkout=success`, so the builder flow can treat the user as paid immediately even if subscription persistence lags or admin sync is unavailable.
  - Taught onboarding to recognize successful `source=onboarding_pricing` returns, apply the paid plan override client-side, and re-enter on the `org` step instead of forcing the user back through pricing.
  - Added focused coverage for both the sync-failure success redirect path and the onboarding pricing return helpers.
- Validation:
  - `pnpm exec vitest run tests/acceptance/pricing-success-return.test.ts tests/acceptance/onboarding-pricing-return.test.ts tests/acceptance/stripe-checkout-route.test.ts` ✅
